spindle_speed_command.description: motor speed command at measurement time
spindle_speed_command.evidence: Motor speed command (data No. 16) This parameter sets the motor speed command at measurement time. The speed is clamped at the maximum speed of the motor

actual_spindle_speed.description: actual motor speed measurement during operation
actual_spindle_speed.evidence: Motor speed (data No. 19) These are spindle motor speed data. Observing data include motor speed

torque_command.description: motor torque command as percentage of maximum torque
torque_command.evidence: Torque command (data No. 90) This is motor torque command data. If shift amount 8, the check board output value is 100%/2.5V

position_error.description: position error data for spindle orientation (4096 pulses/rev)
position_error.evidence: Position error (data No. 136) This is position error data (4096 pulses/rev) for spindle orientation

velocity_error.description: velocity error during spindle control operation
velocity_error.evidence: Velocity error ±128 min⁻¹ at ±5 V, ±256min⁻¹ at ±5 V if d-06 (d-10) is set to 13

synchronous_error.description: synchronous error value converted for the spindle
synchronous_error.evidence: Synchronous error (value converted for the spindle: 4096 pulses/rev) ±128 pulses at ±5 V, ±256 pulses at ±5 V if d-06 (d-10) is set to 1, ±512 pulses at ±5 V if d-06 (d-10) is set to 2

motor_voltage.description: motor voltage setting on orientation or servo mode
motor_voltage.evidence: Motor voltage on orientation Unit of data: 1%, Valid data range: 0 to 100. This data is used to specify the motor voltage for spindle orientation

acceleration_deceleration_time.description: time period for acceleration/deceleration alarm detection disable
acceleration_deceleration_time.evidence: Setting of acceleration/deceleration time, Unit of data: 1sec, Valid data range: 0 to 255, Standard setting value: 10

orientation_time.description: time from spindle orientation command input to completion
orientation_time.evidence: Spindle orientation time (data No. 305) This is the time from the instant when a spindle orientation command is input to the instant when spindle orientation is completed. It is indicated in ms units

speed_arrival_signal.description: speed arrival signal (sara) detection status when motor reaches specified speed
speed_arrival_signal.evidence: Speed arrival signal (SARA) detection range. When the motor speed reaches within ±(setting data/10)% of a specified speed, the speed arrival signal (SARA) is set to 1

zero_speed_detection.evidence: Zero speed detection signal (SSTA) when motor speed is 0.75% of maximum speed or less

load_detection_level_1.description: load detection signal 1 (ldt1a) when motor output exceeds threshold
load_detection_level_1.evidence: Load detection signal 1 (LDT1A) detection range. When the output of the spindle motor is (setting data)% of the maximum output or more, load detection signal 1 (LDT1A) is set to 1

vibration_velocity.description: vibration velocity measurement during spindle operation
vibration_velocity.evidence: Vibration velocity [mm/s] rms 10-2000 Hz at 4000 rpm, 8000 rpm. Severity classification ranges from 0.0 to 0.9 Very Smooth to 10.7 and up Very Rough

vibration_acceleration.description: vibration acceleration measurement during spindle operation
vibration_acceleration.evidence: Vibration acceleration [g] rms 2-20 kHz at 4000 rpm, 8000 rpm with scale markings: 0.05, 0.1, 0.15, 0.2, 0.25 and 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.4

current_command.evidence: Current conversion constant, Maximum current constant, Current coefficient for magnetic flux reduction parameters are specified for motor control

spindle_sequence_state.evidence: Spindle orientation sequence (data No. 298) States: A: Before spindle orientation begins, B: Interval from orientation command to speed reached, C: Linear deceleration interval, D: Position loop closed, E: Spindle orientation completed

speed_arrival_detection.description: signal indicating spindle has reached commanded speed
speed_arrival_detection.evidence: Speed arrival signal (SARA) detection when motor speed reaches within specified range of commanded speed

orientation_completed.description: whether spindle orientation reached target position within tolerance
orientation_completed.evidence: Orientation completion signal detection level. Sets the detecting level of orientation completion signal (ORARA). ORARA = 1 is satisfied if the position error is within the setting

maximum_motor_speed.description: maximum allowable spindle motor speed for the operation
maximum_motor_speed.evidence: Maximum motor speed, This parameter sets a maximum spindle motor speed, Unit of data: 1min⁻¹, Valid data range: 0 to 32767

motor_power_off_delay.description: delay time from motor stop to power cutoff
motor_power_off_delay.evidence: Delay time until the motor power is turned off, Unit of data: 10ms, Valid data range: 0 to 1000, Standard setting value: 20(200ms)

torque_limitation_active.description: indicates if torque limitation is currently applied
torque_limitation_active.evidence: Torque limitation value to be applied when the torque limitation command HIGH (TLMHA) or the torque limitation command LOW (TLMLA) is specified

spindle_alarm.description: alarm signal indicating spindle fault condition
spindle_alarm.evidence: Spindle alarm signal (ALMA) indicates fault conditions like overspeed, velocity error excess, or overload

operation_mode.evidence: Multiple operation modes including velocity control mode, orientation, rigid tapping, and spindle synchronous control

acceleration_value.description: acceleration value when soft start/stop function is enabled
acceleration_value.evidence: Soft start/stop setting time sets an acceleration value (speed change rate) when the soft start/stop function is enabled

motor_current.evidence: Current overload alarm detection level and current detection offset compensation parameters referenced

motor_temperature.evidence: Motor overheat detect level (2-word) and temperature monitoring time constant parameters referenced

orientation_stop_position.description: target stop position for spindle orientation (360 degrees/4096)
orientation_stop_position.evidence: Position coder method orientation stop position with unit of data 1 pulse unit (360 degrees/4096), valid data range 0 to 4095

alarm_detection_status.description: status indicating if any spindle alarm was detected during operation
alarm_detection_status.evidence: Spindle alarm signal (ALMA) and various alarm detection parameters like excessive speed level, overload detection level, velocity error excess detection level

deceleration_time_constant.description: time constant for deceleration phase during operation
deceleration_time_constant.evidence: Setting of acceleration/deceleration time with unit of data 1sec, valid data range 0 to 255, standard setting value 10
